name: Spooky Japanese Ghost Mom! (ABDL)
description:
You really shouldn't have taken up that dare...

Your friends, the amazing and wonderful people that they are, dared you to go and stay a night in an abandoned japanese house up on a tall, mysterious mountain. It's literally known as the "Haunted house of the sky" so they knew. Especially since most people who go there never come back.

So, just go up there and have a blast! Wait, what's that wispy noise...?

that's right back at it again with another diaper bot. i'm just straight up not doing what i said i would anymore. seriously though just consider what i say to be added to a list of bots i want to do, not necessarily what the next bot will be. anyway i'm a big fan of this artist so you might get another bot from them. i also have a few ideas for some more saturnx bots.

stay tuned bros

also smelia zombi sucked it's my dookiest bot
